## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between Ramp and GrowthX to discuss content progress, address issues, and plan upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [21+ blog articles published, performing well; 48 images live, 50 expense category pages updated](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [Content quality issues identified: missing hero images, inconsistent title case, meta description mismatches](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [New vendor directory initiative introduced, focusing on software tool comparisons and reviews](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Team to take on increased publishing load, aiming to double article output](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)

## Topics

### Content Progress and Performance

  - [21+ blog articles published (some last week, some this Monday), performing well](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [48 images live, constantly improving performance](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
  - [50 expense category pages updated (not published as drafts to avoid accidental unpublishing)](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Business credit card articles showing strong performance, with a temporary dip followed by recovery](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)

### Content Quality Issues

  - [Missing hero images and publish dates on recent blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Inconsistent use of sentence case vs. title case throughout articles](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Some meta descriptions and title tags not matching article intent](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Fact-checking concerns: incorrect cash bonus amounts, outdated cash back percentages](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)

### Workflow Improvements

  - [Editor (Yona) to focus exclusively on "best business credit cards" articles](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Implementing fact-checking process for editors to ensure accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
  - [Plans to centralize card data updates starting January to reduce manual errors](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)

### Vendor Directory Initiative

  - [New project focusing on software tool comparisons and reviews](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [URL structure: /vendors with overview, alternatives, and comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
  - [Dynamic data points from proprietary data to populate pages](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Four main categories (e.g., project management, accounting)](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [Team to create longer, more comprehensive content than current examples](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### Technical Updates

  - [Migration to Next.js expected to be completed by January, replacing Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Technical SEO specialist joining to provide high-level site recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Add hero images and publish dates to recently published blog articles](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Implement consistent title case usage across all content](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Improve meta descriptions and title tags to better match article intent](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Develop fact-checking process for editors, especially for "best business credit cards" articles](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
  - [Create first draft of vendor directory content for review by next week](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [GrowthX team to take on increased publishing load, aiming to double output](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
  - [Technical SEO specialist to provide site recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Follow up on Kyle's background check process](https://fathom.video/share/ym-kvgZJ9wBiudjMiJ4G5syThNdFQypM?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
